mapper.select:
select count(*) from tbl_member m left join tbl_business_member bm on bm.id = m.id where 1 = 1
and ( lower(coalesce(m.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(m.member_email, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(bm.company_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
and m.member_role = #{memberRole}::member_role
and m.member_status = #{memberStatus}::member_status

select m.id, m.member_name, m.member_email, bm.company_name, m.member_role, m.member_status, to_char(m.created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created_datetime from tbl_member m left join tbl_business_member bm on bm.id = m.id where 1 = 1
and ( lower(coalesce(m.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(m.member_email, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(bm.company_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
and m.member_role = #{memberRole}::member_role
and m.member_status = #{memberStatus}::member_status
order by m.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on m.id = p.member_id left join tbl_post_product pp on pp.id = p.id left join tbl_category c on c.id = pp.product_category_id where p.reply_post_id is null
and ( lower(coalesce(p.title, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(p.content, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(m.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
and pp.id is not null
and pp.id is null
and c.category_name = #{categoryName}
and p.post_status = #{postStatus}::post_status

select p.id, p.member_id, m.member_name as author_name, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, case when pp.id is not null then 'product' else 'general' end as post_type, c.category_name, p.post_status, to_char(p.created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created_datetime from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on m.id = p.member_id left join tbl_post_product pp on pp.id = p.id left join tbl_category c on c.id = pp.product_category_id where p.reply_post_id is null
and ( lower(coalesce(p.title, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(p.content, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(m.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
and pp.id is not null
and pp.id is null
and c.category_name = #{categoryName}
and p.post_status = #{postStatus}::post_status
order by p.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_report r join tbl_member reporter on reporter.id = r.reporter_id left join tbl_member target_member on target_member.id = r.target_id and r.target_type = 'member' left join tbl_post target_post on target_post.id = r.target_id and r.target_type = 'post' where 1 = 1
and ( lower(coalesce(reporter.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(target_member.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(target_post.title, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(r.reason, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
and r.target_type = #{targetType}::report_target_type
and r.status = #{reportStatus}::report_status

select r.id, reporter.member_name as reporter_name, r.target_type, case when r.target_type = 'member' then coalesce(target_member.member_name, cast(r.target_id as varchar)) when r.target_type = 'post' then coalesce(target_post.title, cast(r.target_id as varchar)) else cast(r.target_id as varchar) end as target_name, r.reason, r.status, to_char(r.created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created_datetime from tbl_report r join tbl_member reporter on reporter.id = r.reporter_id left join tbl_member target_member on target_member.id = r.target_id and r.target_type = 'member' left join tbl_post target_post on target_post.id = r.target_id and r.target_type = 'post' where 1 = 1
and ( lower(coalesce(reporter.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(target_member.member_name, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(target_post.title, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) or lower(coalesce(r.reason, '')) like lower(concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
and r.target_type = #{targetType}::report_target_type
and r.status = #{reportStatus}::report_status
order by r.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
